name: Crown Home Inspections
description: Mold inspection and testing for Greater Kansas City area homes.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Professional, thorough, friendly, easy to work with. The ability to schedule online is a huge plus.
I was able to make some critical decisions based on their feedback. I would highly recommend them.
Inspector was early, very thorough, answered my questions, explained things in non-technical ways.
I received a reply in less than 10 minutes. They fixed it for me almost immediately.

sentiment.summary: Crown Home Inspections has an exceptional reputation with a 4.9/5 rating across 1,261 reviews, consistently praised for professionalism, thoroughness, expert knowledge, and outstanding customer service.
